name: Bunny in Wonderland
desc4: When the equipper is a Defense character: When the equipper launches an <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct> or any squad member triggers a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>Evasive Assist</ct>, all squad members' DMG increases by 6%, stacking up to 3 times, lasting 25s. Stacks decay one at a time, and duration refreshes when gained or decayed. Passive effects of the same name do not stack.
story: A song adapted from a fairy tale well known throughout New Eridu, produced by Rusty Cliff Entertainment. Rumor has it the album cover was based on some "big shot."
